channel.title: Teaching on jgoldfar's home on the web
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching on jgoldfar's home on the web

item.title: MATLAB Short Course, FA13
item.description: MATLAB Seminar on 8/31/2013 Course Files: DigitsOfPi.m, a routine which calculates the digits of pi to within a given tolerance, and handles input errors. exponential.m, an implementation of the exponential function. funct.m, some exercises with functions in MATLAB matrices.m, the matrices we defined and experimented with work.m, our initial batch of work. Recommended Links: Course in which students create GUI applications in MATLAB Here. GUI programming is a bit obtuse in MATLAB compared to e.

item.title: MTH 2201/2202
item.description: MTH 2201/2202: Differential Equations with Linear Algebra Please see the Canvas course website for all relevant information. Dr. Bukshtynov is hosting files relevant to introductory numerical linear algebra and programming in MATLAB, Mathematica, and Julia. Please see that course site if you are interested, and feel free to ask any questions on the codes.
